per_criterion_scores.internal_note: Commands were generally precise but could have included more specific details, such as the number of folds for cross-validation.
The suggestion to use cross-validation was appropriate, but lacked detail on implementation specifics.
The student effectively suggested clarifying AUC-ROC thresholds with industry benchmarks.

justification: The student demonstrated partial understanding with adequate suggestions, but lacked depth and specificity in correction commands and overfitting guidance.
